overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian industrial district with massive elevated highways, cylindrical storage tanks, and futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance. The scene features bright midday sunlight casting harsh shadows, scattered pedestrians, and a gritty cyberpunk aesthetic combining industrial decay with high-tech architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with storage tanks and elevated pipelines

events.description: passing by a group of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial district past large cylindrical tanks

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt and cap walking past the camera
group of three pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive industrial storage tank with metallic surface and external piping
large red warehouse structure with corrugated metal walls
massive overhead industrial highway with steel support beams
tall palm tree with dry fronds growing from the sidewalk
futuristic glass and steel towers visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gritty industrial corridor with massive cylindrical storage tanks on the right and a red warehouse building on the left. The camera moves forward past scattered pedestrians and trash piles, with a large elevated highway structure looming overhead and futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with red warehouse building and accumulated debris

events.description: moving past the cylindrical tanks into a corridor with red warehouse walls
slight left turn while approaching the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk next to the red warehouse building with green windows

notable_agents.action: person in yellow plaid shirt standing against the red building wall

entered.detail: red industrial building with distinctive green window grilles and graffiti
green dumpster and scattered garbage bags along the building wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a corridor dominated by a red warehouse building with green window grilles on the left. The camera passes trash bins and industrial barrels while moving toward an intersection, with the elevated highway structure drawing closer overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection while vehicles pass by
turning right to head down the street toward the city center

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right onto a busier street with more traffic

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection
pedestrian in white shirt and hat crossing the street

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing with faded red and white paint
futuristic crystalline towers dominating the skyline ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide intersection with a marked crosswalk, crossing the street amid moderate vehicle traffic. After crossing, the view opens toward towering glass skyscrapers in the distance as the camera turns right, moving away from the red warehouse into a more open urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial canyon beneath elevated highways with dramatic skyscraper views

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath the elevated highway overpass
looking upward at the towering skyscrapers while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded industrial canyon and looking up at the massive architecture

entered.detail: massive overhead highway structure illuminated with red warning lights along its length
extremely tall futuristic building with illuminated spire reaching into the sky
yellow construction scaffolding and metal frameworks
industrial vents emitting white steam into the air

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow industrial canyon beneath massive elevated highways with red neon lights. The lighting shifts to deep shadow as the camera looks up at a towering skyscraper with an illuminated spire. Steam vents and industrial scaffolding line the left side while the camera continues forward through this dramatic urban gorge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial district that gradually transitions from open sunlit corridors into a shadowed urban canyon. It begins by moving past massive cylindrical storage tanks and a red warehouse, passing scattered pedestrians and trash piles beneath a looming elevated highway. As the camera advances, the red warehouse dominates the left side of the frame before the scene opens into a wide intersection where the camera crosses a marked street amid vehicle traffic. The view then shifts away from the warehouse toward towering glass skyscrapers in the distance before turning right and descending into a narrow industrial gorge. Finally, the lighting shifts to deep shadow as the camera moves beneath massive highways accented by red neon lights, passing steam vents and scaffolding while looking up at an illuminated spire.
